message:
feat(resolv): implement __sym_ntop/__sym_ntos/__sym_ston [bd-58e87f]

Replaces the always-NULL/0 stubs with table-walking implementations
matching libresolv's contract. Each function takes a NULL-terminated
struct res_sym table from the caller (typically __p_class_syms or
__p_type_syms) and:

  __sym_ntop  number → humanname  (or decimal fallback in TLS buf)
  __sym_ntos  number → name       (or decimal fallback in TLS buf)
  __sym_ston  name (case-insens) → number (or sentinel-entry's number)

Adds an 11-test conformance harness diff'd against host libresolv
linking the host's __p_class_syms / __p_type_syms tables directly:
  - 4 ntop class lookups + 4 ntos class lookups
  - 6 ntop type lookups + 6 ntos type lookups
  - unknown-value renders to decimal in both
  - 4 ston class matches + 5 ston type matches + case-insensitivity
  - unknown name returns sentinel number with success=0
  - caller-defined table works (not just libresolv globals)

All cases pass with zero divergences against glibc 2.42.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
